hero.subtitle:
I build AI outbound systems for staffing agencies that fill your client pipeline with hiring managers and HR leaders, on autopilot, inside your existing tools.
By Vitor Pepicon, Top 1% on Upwork, 100+ projects.

trustedBy.suffix: ...and other lean teams that automated before they hired.
trustedBy.tagline: Built quietly into your existing stack while your team stays focused on closing deals.

services.title: What I build for staffing teams
services.subtitle: Every system is custom built around your client acquisition process. Nothing off the shelf.

features.label: AI Powered Prospect Scoring
features.description: AI scores every prospect using your CRM data, engagement signals, and complete company details. Your sales team stops guessing and calls the hiring managers most likely to convert, right from inside your CRM.

features.label: Personalized Client Outreach on Autopilot
features.description: AI powered sequences that write relevant messages for each role, to hiring managers and HR leaders. Real personalization at scale across email and optionally LinkedIn. You get replies from decision makers, not spam complaints.

features.label: Prospect Research on Autopilot
features.description: As companies enter your pipeline, missing data gets filled automatically, including company size, hiring volume, industry, and direct contacts, pulled from multiple B2B sources. No more manual LinkedIn stalking. Complete context on every prospect, inside your CRM.

features.label: Email Infrastructure & Deliverability
features.description: Cold outreach only works if it hits the inbox. I set up sending domains, configure email authentication, warm up mailboxes, and monitor sender reputation so your emails land in the inbox. Production ready infrastructure that doesn't trigger spam filters.

items.name: Mark Kempton
items.text: Super responsive, highly professional. We're already planning the next project.

items.name: Eric Plotts
items.text: Vitor is a beast. Honest, smart, hardworking. One of the best I've worked with.

items.name: Brandon Priest
items.text: Amazing experience with Vitor!! Will continue to work with him longterm.

items.name: Jacobo Escobar
items.text: Vitor is amazing! He did exactly what needed to be done and was fun to work with. He is very good at communication when we needed anything or had questions... The project was a huge success and we'll continue working together on this project for smaller portions of it.

items.name: Gary Nezri
items.text: I have never known a better and more professional developer in my life. A person who has enthusiasm, drive, is trustworthy, has perfect English... If you're looking for someone you won't have to worry about and he will solve everything for you, you definitely won't find a better consultant.

pricing.intro: No sales calls required. Pick a tier and go.

plans.name: Sales Audit
plans.description: I review your client acquisition process, tools, and outreach, and reply with 2 to 3 high impact automation ideas within 48 hours.
features: Personalized review of your CRM and outreach process
Highest leverage client acquisition automation opportunities identified
Actionable recommendations you can use immediately
No calls, no commitments

plans.name: Launchpad
plans.description: Your first AI outbound system, live in your stack within 2 weeks.
features: Full audit plus ideal client profile
Email infrastructure setup (sending domains, authentication, and warmup)
One production-ready outreach sequence targeting hiring managers
Prospecting system configured with your ideal client criteria plus first campaign batch loaded and ready to send
30 minute video walkthrough of everything built
Cost applies toward a Full Build
plans.bottomLine: What you get: hiring managers and HR leaders landing in your inbox within 2 weeks, plus a clear roadmap to scale.

plans.name: Full Build
plans.description: Complete AI powered client acquisition engine, scoring, outreach, automation, and everything to run it.
features: Everything in Launchpad, plus:
AI prospect scoring built into your CRM
Multi step AI powered outreach (email plus optional LinkedIn)
Automated follow-ups, prospect routing, deal updates
Automatic reply sorting (AI flags interested, not interested, and out-of-office)
Prospecting system configured with automatic data completion, first campaign loaded, scored, and ready to send
Performance reporting template
Works with HubSpot, Bullhorn, Pipedrive, Zoho, etc.
1:1 training plus 2 weeks post launch support
plans.bottomLine: What you get: save 20 to 40 hours each month on client acquisition, double your reply rates, and fill your pipeline without hiring a sales rep.

plans.name: Managed Ops
plans.description: I run your client pipeline end to end, scoped for lean teams running 1 to 2 active outbound campaigns.
features: Monthly prospect list refreshes with new target companies
Campaign monitoring: inbox placement, opens, and replies
Testing and optimizing outreach copy
Automatic reply sorting, interested prospects forwarded to you
Monthly performance report (data plus video walkthrough)
Additional campaigns or verticals scoped as add-ons
Fast support via email or Slack
plans.bottomLine: What you get: a done for you client acquisition engine. I handle everything upstream of the client conversation.

items.question: Can you integrate with my current CRM and tools?
items.answer: Yes. HubSpot, Bullhorn, Pipedrive, Zoho, and anything with an API or Zapier/Make integration. I also set up email infrastructure from scratch if you need outbound built from zero.

items.question: Do I need technical expertise to work with you?
items.answer: Zero. You focus on selling, I'll handle the nerdy stuff behind the curtain.

items.question: How quickly can I expect results?
items.answer: Launchpad clients see prospects flowing within 2 weeks. Full Build clients typically see measurable improvements in reply rates and pipeline within the first month.

items.question: What if I'm not even sure what I need?
items.answer: No problem: bring your chaos to the email exchange and I'll bring the clarity.

items.question: Is this just another AI tool?
items.answer: No. I don't sell software. I build custom automation into your existing tools and, with Managed Ops, run your entire client outreach for you. Hands on consulting plus done for you execution.

items.question: Do I need to commit to the monthly plan?
items.answer: No. You can stop after the Full Build and run it yourself. Managed Ops is for teams who want me to operate and optimize the client pipeline month over month.

items.question: What's the difference between Full Build and Managed Ops?
items.answer: Full Build installs the engine. Managed Ops means I run it. With Full Build, you get a complete system and training. With Managed Ops, I handle prospect lists, campaigns, inbox placement, and automatic reply sorting, and you just take the client meetings.

items.question: What does Managed Ops actually include each month?
items.answer: Fresh prospect lists, campaign monitoring and optimization, testing different message versions on outreach copy, AI powered reply sorting with interested prospects forwarded to you, and a performance report with video walkthrough.

about.title: Hey, I'm Vitor Pepicon 👋
content: 100+ projects as a Top 1% Upwork consultant. Now I focus on one thing: building AI powered client acquisition systems for staffing agencies that need more clients without hiring more reps.

I build prospect scoring, AI powered outreach to hiring managers, and CRM automations, and with Managed Ops, I run the whole pipeline for you. No new platforms. No new hires. Just more client meetings on your calendar.
Send me your setup and I'll reply with a free sales audit within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: AI powered client acquisition for staffing agencies.
